diagnostics.title: Bot permissions
diagnostics.subtitle: Checks only enabled Rankoon features and their configured resources.
diagnostics.noIssues: No critical problems or warnings were found.
diagnostics.emptyText: Run a diagnostic scan to inspect the current Discord configuration.

global.intent: A required gateway intent is disabled.
global.administrator: Rankoon has Administrator. It works, but has more access than required.
global.unavailable: Discord data is not currently available.

configuration.missing: An enabled feature has no usable configured resource.

role.missing: The configured role no longer exists.
role.unmanageable: Discord-managed and @everyone roles cannot be assigned.
role.hierarchy: The role is at or above Rankoon's highest role.

remediation.grantManageRoles: Grant Rankoon Manage Roles, then keep its role above roles it assigns.
remediation.channelPermission: Grant the listed granular permission in the channel or its category. Do not grant Administrator.
remediation.enableIntent: Enable the required intent in Rankoon and the Discord Developer Portal.
remediation.removeAdministrator: Replace Administrator with only the granular permissions Rankoon needs.
remediation.reconnect: Wait for Rankoon to reconnect, then run the scan again.
remediation.configure: Configure a valid resource or disable the feature.
remediation.removeDeletedRole: Remove the deleted role from Rankoon configuration.
remediation.selectManageableRole: Select a normal, non-managed Discord role.
remediation.moveBotRole: Move Rankoon's highest role above this role in Discord server settings.
